items.title: IN A HISTORIC FIRST, INS SUDARSHINI ARRIVES AT LAS PALMAS, SPAIN
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence IN A HISTORIC FIRST, INS SUDARSHINI ARRIVES AT LAS PALMAS, SPAIN Maiden visit of an Indian Naval Ship to the Canary Islands archipelago Posted On: 24 APR 2026 3:01PM by PIB Delhi The Indian Navy’s Sail Training Ship INS Sudarshini arrived at Las Palmas on 23 Apr 2026, as part of her ongoing transoceanic deployment under Lokayan 26.
